name: Chocolate Christmas Candies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peanut butter and butter in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until melted. Remove from the heat.
3. In a bowl, combine the graham cracker crumbs, confectioners' sugar, coconut, and walnuts.
4. Pour the peanut butter mixture over all ingredients then toss until well blended.
5. Shape the mixture into 1/2-inch balls.
6. Place the balls on waxed paper lined baking sheets.
7. Cover with aluminum foil.
8. Chill in the refrigerator.
9. In a double boiler, combine the chocolate chips and paraffin. Place over hot water and stir until melted.
10. Dip the balls in the chocolate.
11. Place on waxed paper lined baking sheets and let stand until the chocolate is set.
12. Cover with aluminum foil and store in the refrigerator. Makes about 2 lbs of candy.
